channel.title: ladbible TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ladbible

item.title: The next time someone asks, "Need anything from @Tesco ?" tell them you're looking for a holiday. ✈️ Amanda Holden takes over the self-service bagging area to surprise shoppers with a major travel hack 🛒
item.description: The next time someone asks, "Need anything from @Tesco ?" tell them you're looking for a holiday. ✈️ Amanda Holden takes over the self-service bagging area to surprise shoppers with a major travel hack 🛒
item.author: ladbible

item.title: It’s time to put an end to violence against women and girls. Abuse can be physical, it can be emotional, it can happen online. We all have a role to play in ending violence against women and girls and a critical first step is recognising it for what it
item.description: It’s time to put an end to violence against women and girls. Abuse can be physical, it can be emotional, it can happen online. We all have a role to play in ending violence against women and girls and a critical first step is recognising it for what it
item.author: ladbible
